Transcript:
I want to talk to you about selling in a
down Market what we have to do to adapt
because it affects everybody affects
everybody I know it affects people like
me affects people like you so I want to
just pass along a couple of things that
I've done to help me in a down Market
the first thing is I actually have to
make a mental adjustment right I've got
to tell myself that some of this is
outside of my control not all of it I
then remind myself to focus on what I
can control I will then go back and look
at my best times what was I doing during
my best moments of success what did the
messaging look like what did the
sequence or Cadence look like what types
of companies were I going was I going
after what type of people were I going
after what were the titles and I do an
audit of those things to see if I've
shifted anything or to see if I can
remind myself to go back to doing
something that I know did really really
well other thing that I do is I spend
time learning more I actually do spend
time reading a book listening to a book
or a podcast going in and looking about
some new sales cycle some new sales
process just something that makes me
feel like I'm on top of the latest and
of course AI I've been reading a lot
about Ai and trying to figure that stuff
out and if I were a rep I would want to
make sure that I understand everything I
can about AI as a sales rep to make me
more valuable not only to my current
employer but potentially my next
employer if that's where things come and
then the final thing is I take care of
myself I exercise I go on walks I spend
time with my family I spend time doing
some things that I like because maybe I
have a little bit more time which is
actually not a bad thing it's actually a
good thing for you to take a moment
exhale breathe be present within
yourself and with other people those are
just some of the things I've done to
adapt and I would love to hear from you
on things you do to adapt as well
